items.headline: Welcome to the New MiSTer Companion
items.message:
Welcome to the new and improved MiSTer Companion.

Version 4 brings a refreshed interface, Offline Mode, improved performance, expanded MiSTer Settings features, a RetroAchievements viewer, and many other improvements throughout the app.

If you run into any issues or have suggestions, please use the Feedback button in MiSTer Companion to report them.

If you enjoy the app and would like to support its continued development, the Support button is there for anyone who wants to help out. Thank you for using MiSTer Companion.
